# KRITIKAAL
> Managed Leather Manufacturing from India for the World

## Company Overview
KRITIKAAL is India's premium managed leather manufacturing partner, specifically designed for global fashion brands, designers, and private labels. We bridge the gap between global brands and India's finest leather artisans, providing end-to-end manufacturing solutions without the traditional sourcing headaches.

## Sourcing Capabilities
We source premium quality leather directly from LWG (Leather Working Group) certified tanneries in India. Our capabilities span:
- Full-grain and top-grain cowhide, buffalo, goat, and sheep leather
- Vegetable-tanned leathers
- Sustainable and chrome-free leathers
- Exotic textures and custom finishes
- Hardware sourcing (brass, zinc alloys, custom engraved)

## Manufacturing Process & Clusters
We operate across India's most prestigious leather manufacturing clusters, pairing each project with the factory best suited for the specific product category:
- Agra: Specialized in premium leather footwear
- Kanpur: Renowned for heavy leathers, belts, and industrial goods
- Kolkata: Experts in fine leather bags, wallets, and intricate accessories

Our manufacturing adheres strictly to international quality standards, employing both traditional craftsmanship and modern machinery.

## Products & OEM / Private Label
We offer full OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) and private label services. Brands can provide tech packs, sketches, or reference samples, and we handle the rest.
Categories include:
- Leather Footwear (formal, casual, boots, sandals)
- Leather Bags (totes, satchels, duffels, backpacks)
- Leather Wallets (bifold, cardholders, zip-around)
- Leather Belts (classic, braided, fashion)
- Leather Garments (jackets, coats, pants)
- Leather Accessories (keychains, watch straps, corporate gifts)

## Buyer Workflow
1. Consultation: Discuss product requirements, target price, and timelines.
2. Sample Development: We create physical prototypes based on your tech packs (15-20 days).
3. Revision & Approval: Samples are shipped to you for review. Adjustments are made if necessary.
4. Production: Once samples and terms are approved, bulk manufacturing begins.
5. Quality Control: Our on-ground team performs rigorous AQL (Acceptable Quality Limit) inspections.
6. Export & Logistics: We handle packaging, customs clearance, and global shipping (FOB/CIF/DDP).

## Compliance Details
We strictly adhere to global environmental and safety standards:
- REACH (EU chemical standards)
- Prop 65 / CA65 (California safety standards)
- Oeko-Tex Standard 100
- Ethical Labor Practices (no child labor, fair wages, safe conditions)

## Export Markets
We seamlessly export to all major global markets, taking advantage of India's favorable trade agreements (like 0% import duties in the UK and Australia for Indian leather goods).
Primary markets:
- North America (USA, Canada)
- Europe (UK, Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Netherlands)
- Middle East (UAE, Israel)
- Asia-Pacific (Australia)

## FAQ & Key Information

Q: What is your Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)?
A: Our MOQ starts from 300 units per style/color, making it accessible for growing brands.

Q: What are the typical lead times?
A: Sample development takes 15-20 days. Bulk manufacturing takes 45-60 days after sample approval.

Q: Do you offer drop-shipping?
A: No, we specialize in B2B bulk manufacturing and export.

Q: Why manufacture in India instead of China?
A: India offers highly skilled leather artisans at competitive costs, lower import tariffs in many western markets (often 0% duty), and a growing infrastructure for sustainable leather production without the geopolitical risks associated with other regions.
